name: Italian Pasta Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions. Keep warm.
2. Slice zucchini with grater-slicer.
3. Chop onion and tomatoes with food chopper.
4. Snip parsley using kitchen cutters.
5. Heat olive oil in stir-fry skillet.
6. Press garlic with garlic press into skillet.
7. Stir-fry 15 seconds.
8. Add zucchini and onion. Stir-fry 2-3 minutes, until crisp tender.
9. Add tomatoes, parsley, and seasonings to skillet. Gently stir 1-2 minutes, until thoroughly heated.
10. Remove from heat. Stir in warm pasta and Parmesan cheese.
11. Serve immediately. Yield: 4-6 servings.
